heading: Gross salary of Library of Congress employees
label: 162a Gross salary of Library of Congress employees
text: Hereafter the gross salary of any position in the Library which is augmented by payment of an honorarium from other than appropriated funds under terms of shall not exceed an amount, which when combined with such honorarium, will exceed the maximum salary provided in chapter 51 and subchapter III of chapter 53 of title 5.section 162 of this title
notes: Codification“Chapter 51 and subchapter III of chapter 53 of title 5” substituted in text for “the Classification Act of 1949” on authority of , , , section 1 of which enacted Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.section 7(b) of Pub. L. 89–55480 Stat. 631Sept. 6, 1966
Amendments1949—Act , substituted “Classification Act of 1949” for “Classification Act of 1923”.Oct. 28, 1949
Repeals, cited as a credit to this section, was repealed (subject to a savings clause) by , , § 8, , 655.Act Oct. 28, 1949, ch. 782Pub. L. 89–55480 Stat. 632Sept. 6, 1966
